2265940.name: Evil Dungeon
2265940.description:
A group of heroes has arrived to your dungeon, do your best to protect the continuous waves of invaders.

Loot your enemies, get upgrades and level up to evolve your character to improved versions with better abilities

All runs are different

  • Fight against waves of enemies invading your dungeon
  • Mix items to create your build
  • Pick upgrades
  • Discover new characters, enemies and items each run

The game supports online multiplayer for up to 16 players. Play PvP matches or coop mode.
2265940.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
